title: Modcraft's Fursuits
description: This mod adds 33 fursuit heads, 16 wolf ones and 17 kemono ones. They are very expensive but very powerful.
body:
A mod that adds 33 different fursuit heads:
Red Wolf Fursuit Head,
Orange Wolf Fursuit Head,
Yellow Wolf Fursuit Head,
Lime Wolf Fursuit Head,
Green Wolf Fursuit Head,
Cyan Wolf Fursuit Head,
Light Blue Wolf Fursuit Head,
Blue Wolf Fursuit Head,
Purple Wolf Fursuit Head,
Magenta Wolf Fursuit Head,
Pink Wolf Fursuit Head,
Brown Wolf Fursuit Head,
Black Wolf Fursuit Head,
Grey Wolf Fursuit Head,
Light Grey Wolf Fursuit Head,
White Wolf Fursuit Head,
Red Kemono Fursuit Head,
Orange Kemono Fursuit Head,
Yellow Kemono Fursuit Head,
Lime Kemono Fursuit Head,
Green Kemono Fursuit Head,
Cyan Kemono Fursuit Head,
Light Blue Kemono Fursuit Head,
Blue Kemono Fursuit Head,
Purple Kemono Fursuit Head,
Magenta Kemono Fursuit Head,
Pink Kemono Fursuit Head,
Brown Kemono Fursuit Head,
Black Kemono Fursuit Head,
Grey Kemono Fursuit Head,
Light Grey Kemono Fursuit Head,
White Kemono Fursuit Head,
and the Boykisser Fursuit head.

All of which (exept for the boykisser one) are crafted from 7 of their corresponding wool color, and a netherite helmet.
